title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 -  16 -  2017: French Castles on Google Earth

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his late-night session cataloging French castles on Google Earth using Flickr, working through them alphabetically. He also discusses reading Plato's Laws and its detailed vision for a utopian city-state of 5,040 people, which he wants to use as inspiration for designing his own version centered on Boulder. He shares excitement about eventually making immersive videos narrating castle histories.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds them aesthetically beautiful and exciting to explore, especially their hilltop locations
fascinated by its detailed city-state design; wants to apply similar thinking to create his own 'little world' modeled on Boulder
wants to get high and narrate castle histories to create an immersive past-life-like experience
feels the Boulder Google Earth project is the closest to done; using the castle goal as motivation to keep going
